title: Zerolang checked set tool-flow fixture
prompt: FAKE_ZEROLANG_GRAPH_EDIT. Use the Zerolang checked graph edit workflow for a string literal update and report verification.

files.contents:
#!/bin/sh
if [ "$1 $2 $3" = "graph dump --json" ]; then
  cat <<'JSON'
{"ok":true,"graphHash":"graph:f76987e99677f1b3","moduleIdentity":"module:main","nodes":[{"id":"#610c78bf","kind":"Literal","type":"String","value":"hello from zero\n"}],"edges":[]}
JSON
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$1 $2 $3" = "graph patch --json" ]; then
  perl -0pi -e 's/hello from zero/hello from roder/g' src/main.0
  cat <<'JSON'
{"ok":true,"originalGraphHash":"graph:f76987e99677f1b3","patchedGraphHash":"graph:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa","operationCount":1,"operations":[{"ok":true,"op":"set","node":"#610c78bf","field":"value","actual":"hello from zero\n","value":"hello from roder\n"}],"saved":{"path":"src/main.0"}}
JSON
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$1 $2 $3" = "graph check --json" ]; then
  printf '{"ok":true,"graphHash":"graph:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}\n'
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$1 $2" = "check --json" ]; then
  printf '{"ok":true}\n'
  exit 0
fi
printf '{"ok":true}\n'

commandChecks.command: cargo run -q --manifest-path /Users/pz/w/gode/Cargo.toml -p roder-cli -- --config-dir .roder-test zerolang edit src/main.0 --graph-hash graph:f76987e99677f1b3 --operation-json '{"op":"rename","node":"#ea5ea1ca","expect":"main","value":"start"}' --dry-run

constraints: must use graphHash-backed zerolang_edit semantics instead of raw source replacement
